title: Tarball for Verilator?  And 'make test' fails (Fedora 32)
body:
Hi,

It has been increasingly difficult (for me) to find a Verilator tarball of late.  It seems to get more and more 'hidden' or deprecated as time goes on.  Now I can't find it at all.  

Git doesn't fit well with my methods, and is currently borked in some way.  A tarball always works and I can go back and forth between versions more easily. 

Is there a tarball available somewhere?  Sorry if it's actually 'hidden' in plain site... I really have tried to find it multiple times. :)

Also, 'make test' hasn't worked for me since 4.202...

... (lots like this)
/usr/bin/ld: Vt_a1_first_cc__ALL.a(Vt_a1_first_cc__ALL.o): in function `Vt_a1_first_cc::trace(VerilatedVcdC*, int, int)':
Vt_a1_first_cc__ALL.cpp:(.text+0x888): multiple definition of `Vt_a1_first_cc::trace(VerilatedVcdC*, int, int)'; Vt_a1_first_cc__ALL.a(Vt_a1_first_cc__ALLsup.o):Vt_a1_first_cc__ALLsup.cpp:(.text+0x1f2): first defined here
/usr/bin/ld: Vt_a1_first_cc__ALL.a(Vt_a1_first_cc__ALLsup.o): in function `Vt_a1_first_cc__Syms::Vt_a1_first_cc__Syms(Vt_a1_first_cc*, char const*)':
Vt_a1_first_cc__ALLsup.cpp:(.text+0x189): undefined reference to `VerilatedSyms::VerilatedSyms()'
/usr/bin/ld: Vt_a1_first_cc__ALL.a(Vt_a1_first_cc__ALLsup.o): in function `Vt_a1_first_cc::trace(VerilatedVcdC*, int, int)':
Vt_a1_first_cc__ALLsup.cpp:(.text+0x22e): undefined reference to `VerilatedVcd::addCallback(void (*)(VerilatedVcd*, void*, unsigned int), void (*)(VerilatedVcd*, void*, unsigned int), void (*)(VerilatedVcd*, void*, unsigned int), void*)'
/usr/bin/ld: Vt_a1_first_cc__ALL.a(Vt_a1_first_cc__ALLsup.o): in function `Vt_a1_first_cc::traceInitThis(Vt_a1_first_cc__Syms*, VerilatedVcd*, unsigned int)':
Vt_a1_first_cc__ALLsup.cpp:(.text+0x361): undefined reference to `VerilatedVcd::module(std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> > const&)'
/usr/bin/ld: Vt_a1_first_cc__ALL.a(Vt_a1_first_cc__ALLsup.o): in function `Verilated::calcUnusedSigs()':
Vt_a1_first_cc__ALLsup.cpp:(.text._ZN9Verilated14calcUnusedSigsEv[_ZN9Verilated14calcUnusedSigsEv]+0x7): undefined reference to `Verilated::s_s'
collect2: error: ld returned 1 exit status
make[1]: *** [Vt_a1_first_cc.mk:63: Vt_a1_first_cc] Error 1
...
======================================================================
	#vlt/t_a1_first_cc: %Error: Exec of make failed: g++  -I.  -MMD -I/home/rmm/src/verilator/test_regress/../include -I/home/rmm/src/verilator/test_regress/../include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TRACE=1 -DVM_TRACE_FST=0 -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-shadow      -std=gnu++14 -DVERILATOR=1 -DVL_DEBUG=1 -DTEST_OBJ_DIR=obj_vlt/t_a1_first_cc -DVM_PREFIX=Vt_a1_first_cc -DVM_PREFIX_INCLUDE="<Vt_a1_first_cc.h>" -DT_A1_FIRST_CC   -O0 -c -o Vt_a1_first_cc__main.o ../../obj_vlt/t_a1_first_cc/Vt_a1_first_cc__main.cpp
		make && test_regress/t/t_a1_first_cc.pl  --vlt
TESTS DONE, FAILED: Passed 0  Failed 1  Unsup 0  Time 0:07
make: *** [Makefile:257: smoke-test] Error 10


Thanks,
Richard
